allow: PowerShell($env:NG_CLI_ANALYTICS = "false"; npx -y @angular/cli@22 new ai-engineering-workshop --directory . --style scss --ssr false --skip-git --defaults)
PowerShell(npx ng version 2>$null | Select-String -Pattern "Angular CLI|@angular/core|Node|Package Manager"; "---STYLE---"; \(Get-Content angular.json | Select-String "scss"\))
